entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., the target crop for growth promotion studies

entities.name: SEEDLING EMERGENCE
entities.description: The process of the seedling emerging from the soil

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH
entities.description: The overall development and increase in size of the plant

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The quantity of pods produced by the groundnut plant

entities.name: PLANT BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of the plant material

entities.name: SEED TREATMENT
entities.description: The application of bacterial isolates to seeds before sowing

entities.name: SEED BACTERIZATION
entities.description: The process of treating seeds with beneficial bacteria to promote growth

entities.name: BACILLUS FIRMIS GRS 123
entities.description: A rhizosphere-associated bacterial isolate that increases plant biomass and pod yield

entities.name: BACILLUS MEGATERIUM GPS 55
entities.description: A phylloplane-associated bacterial isolate that increases plant biomass and pod yield

entities.name: PSEUDOMONAS AERUGINOSA GPS 21
entities.description: A phylloplane-associated bacterial isolate that increases plant biomass and pod yield

entities.name: PHYLLOPLANE BACTERIA
entities.description: Bacteria associated with the surface of plant leaves

entities.name: RHIZOSPHERE BACTERIA
entities.description: Bacteria associated with the soil surrounding the roots

entities.name: GEOCARPOSPHERE
entities.description: The region of soil surrounding the groundnut pod

entities.name: ENDOPHYTES
entities.description: Microorganisms that live inside plant tissues

entities.name: L-TRYPTOPHAN-DERIVED AUXINS
entities.description: Hormones derived from L-tryptophan that potentially promote plant growth

entities.name: RIFAMPICIN-RESISTANT MUTANTS
entities.description: Mutated bacterial strains used to track colonization in the plant

entities.name: ECTORHIZOSPHERE
entities.description: The outer region of the root-associated soil

entities.name: ENDORHIZOSPHERE
entities.description: The internal region of the root tissues

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH-PROMOTING RHIZOBACTERIA
entities.description: Bacteria that enhance plant growth through various mechanisms

entities.name: GREENHOUSE
entities.description: A controlled environment used for initial seed treatment testing

entities.name: FIELD
entities.description: The natural agricultural environment where growth and yield were measured
